features: If you are looking for a neat and tidy wall mounting solution for your TV then look no further than our ultra slimline flat wall bracket.
Securely fit your TV to a solid or wood stud wall with all wall fixings supplied in the box.
Clear Video guide to help with installation plus wall template and bubble level included.
Designed in the UK with easy to follow user instructions supplied and an optional online height calculator to help you work out your perfect TV height
Eco-friendly black powder coated steel with secure locking screws to prevent children or pets dislodging the TV providing you with peace of mind.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page The low profile, Flat to Wall Mahara TV Mount will create a modern look and open up space in any room. Mounting on the wall protects kids or pets from accidentally tipping or knocking over the TV. Setup is a cinch with our video guide, TV Height Calculator, handy wall template and bubble level. COMPATIBILITY Suitable for TVs from 32 to 65" MHLFW4B fits TVs from 32 to 65" with a maximum weight of 40 kg . All VESA sizes between 50 x 50 and 400 x 400 mm are supported, including these standard sizes: 50 x 50 mm, 75 x 75 mm, 100 x 100 mm, 200 x 100 mm, 200 x 200 mm, 200 x 300 mm, 300 x 100 mm, 300 x 200 mm, 300 x 300 mm, 400 x 100 mm, 400 x 200 mm, 400 x 300 mm, 400 x 400 mm "VESA size" is the distance between the four mounting holes on the back of your TV (width x height) Previous page INSTALLATION MADE EASY TV Height Calculator App Our easy web app allows you to mount your TV at your desired height - no download required! INSTALLATION MADE EASY Removable Bubble Level A removable bubble level is included in the box, to ensure a perfect installation. INSTALLATION MADE EASY Wall Marking Template Our easy to use template allows you to position your holes before you start drilling. INSTALLATION MADE EASY Clear Printed Instructions Clear, printed instructions are included, with helpful links to our video guide. Next page 1 TV Height Calculator 2 Bubble Level 3 Wall Template 4 Clear Instructions SPECIFICATION TV Size 32 – 65" / 81 – 165 cm Max TV Weight 40 kg / 88 lb Compatible VESA Sizes 50 x 50 mm, 75 x 75 mm, 100 x 100 mm, 100 x 200 mm, 200 x 100 mm, 200 x 200 mm, 200 x 300 mm, 300 x 100 mm, 300 x 200 mm, 300 x 300 mm, 400 x 200 mm, 400 x 400 mm Distance from Wall 2.3 cm / 0.91" Function Flat to Wall Colour Black TV Fixings Included 4 x M4 Screws (16mm); 4 x M4 Screws (30mm); 4 x M6 Screws (16mm); 4 x M6 Screws (30mm); 4 x M8 Screws (25mm); 4 x M8 Screws (45mm); 4 x M6 Washers; 4 x TV Spacers (Full); 4 x TV Spacers (Half) Wall Fixings Included 4 x 12x50mm Screws; 4 x M6 Washers; 4 x Wall Plugs WIll it fit my TV? A small amount of 65" TVs may have VESA fixings greater than 400 x 400 so please be sure to check compatibility before purchasing.
